meta.title: [4K Slow-Mo] Starship Flight 7 Launch & Catch // Clean Audio SUPER CUT!
meta.description:
Enjoy this incredible audio and video from around the launch pad of the 7th full flight test of Starship, featuring the second Super Heavy Booster catch!!! 4K slow motion captured on various cameras including ZCam, Freefly Ember, BlackMagic 12K Ursa, and RED Komodo X with SIGMA lenses and Meade Telescopes.

SpaceX's 7th launch of Starship took place on January 16th, 2025, from Starbase, TX. 

New merch out now!!!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

To license content: Ryan@CosmicPerspective.com

https://www.youtube.com/cosmicperspective

VR content - https://cosmicperspective.com/vr

End song: "Scale of it all" by Everyday Astronaut

Everyday Astronaut & Cosmic Perspective Team Members //
Ryan Chylinski, Andrew Keating, Spencer Tetik, John Pisani, Steve Wilson, MaryLiz Chylinski, Nick Jakubik, Andrew Taylor, Collin Thrash, Ben Stineman, Ryan & Ella Kronenburg, Benny Burtt & Jason Achilles, Kelly Rodriguez⁩, Guinn Partners, Sigma America, Z CAM and Freefly Systems

00:00 - Intro
00:10 - East Wide
00:38 - East Tight
01:14 - East Landing Track
01:40 - North Launch Track
02:45 - North Landing Track
03:30 - Pad Track
04:23 - Pad Tight
05:15 - Pad Landing
06:28 - Pad Landing Track Slow Mo
07:25 - Pad 360 Camera
07:52 - Trackers BTS
08:22 - Tim BTS Launch
09:07 - Tim BTS Landing
09:47 - South Wide Track Full
17:06 - South Wide Track Slow Mo
19:02 - South Tight Track Slow Mo

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

All music is original! Find it anywhere you listen to music! (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc)
